message: I transferred 2,000,000 VND this morning. My account was debited but the receiver has not received the money. Transaction ID is TX123456.
I applied for a new ATM card two weeks ago but have not received it at my registered address.
My account is blocked after I entered the wrong password three times. I need urgent help to unlock it.
A POS payment failed at the supermarket but my account was charged. I want to request a refund.
Someone called me asking for my OTP and said they are from the bank. I suspect fraud and need urgent support.
